parameters.command: sh -c 'SCRIPT=/workspace/yf-enrichment-v1/daily_enrichment.py; if [ ! -f "$SCRIPT" ]; then SCRIPT=/files/yf-enrichment-v1/daily_enrichment.py; fi; if [ ! -f "$SCRIPT" ]; then echo "daily_enrichment.py not found (checked /workspace and /files)"; exit 1; fi; python "$SCRIPT" --yf-enrich-db-path "${YF_ENRICH_DB_PATH:-/files/duckdb/yf_enrichment_v1.duckdb}" --ag2-db-path "${AG2_DUCKDB_PATH:-/files/duckdb/ag2_v2.duckdb}" --yf-api-url "${YFINANCE_API_URL:-http://yfinance-api:8080}" --target-days "${YF_ENRICH_OPTIONS_TARGET_DAYS:-30}" --quote-chunk-size "${YF_ENRICH_QUOTE_CHUNK:-80}" --timeout-sec "${YF_ENRICH_TIMEOUT_SEC:-14}"'
